reasoning: We need to address your poor lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. Your last ride showed a steady state effort below threshold, indicating readiness for more intensity. This session will prepare you for the sustained demands of the Alpine Loop's key climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 12 min over-unders: 2 min at 218W, 3 min at 248W, 2 min at 218W, 3 min at 248W, 2 min at 218W. 3 min recovery at 175W between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
